title: Funkys Fancy Furnaces
description: This mod adds various new furnaces similar to the smoker and blast furnace to enhance cooking speed.
body:
**Funkys Fancy Furnaces** adds a collection of new, purpose-built furnaces that work just like the vanilla Smoker and Blast Furnace, but for different item categories. These furnaces provide faster processing for specific materials, making your workflows more efficient and streamlined.

![Ticks'n'Bricks release title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4212b99fce6ac94e3c3113b4ecef7dc5857d2055.png)
